# JDK-8339196: Optimize BufWriterImpl#writeU1/U2/Int/Long

> **PR**: [20748](https://github.com/openjdk/jdk/pull/20748) | **Author**: wenshao | **Status**: merged

## Summary

A small optimization makes BufWriterImpl's writeU1/U2/Int/Long methods more C2-friendly and improves performance.
